response:
joke is not the right way to start this serious topic about illegal activity.

drug trafficking means moving controlled substances across borders or regions for profit.

the heart of the matter involves breaking laws that protect public safety and health.

many people suffer when these dangerous goods enter communities without any oversight.

law enforcement works hard to stop the flow of these harmful items everywhere.

the heart of the problem remains the high demand that fuels this criminal network.

penalties for those caught are severe and often include long prison sentences.

international cooperation is essential to dismantle the groups that run these operations.

stopping this trade requires a united effort from all nations around the world.
